scripts.dev:raw: concurrently -n WEB,API,BEAST,SUP -c cyan,magenta,green,yellow "npm run dev -w @malv/web" "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:beast" "npm run dev:supervisor"
scripts.dev:backend: concurrently -n API,BEAST,SUP -c magenta,green,yellow "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:beast" "npm run dev:supervisor"
scripts.dev:next: concurrently -n NEXT,API -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev --prefix apps/malv-frontend" "npm run dev -w @malv/api"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @malv/explore-action-handoff && npm run build -w @malv/web && npm run build -w @malv/api && npm run build -w @malv/beast-worker && npm run build -w @malv/supervisor
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @malv/web && npm run typecheck -w @malv/api && npm run typecheck -w @malv/supervisor
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @malv/web && npm run lint -w @malv/api && npm run lint -w @malv/supervisor
